columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Date and time when the event was recorded

columns.name: LastEditedTime
columns.description: Date and time when the message was last edited

columns.name: TeamsMessageId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the message, as generated by Microsoft 365

columns.name: SenderEmailAddress
columns.description: Email address of the sender

columns.name: SenderDisplayName
columns.description: Name of the sender displayed in the address book, typically a combination of a first name, a middle initial, and a last name or surname

columns.name: SenderObjectId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the sender’s account

columns.name: SenderType
columns.description: Type of user that sent the message, for example, User, Group, Anonymous

columns.name: RecipientDetails
columns.description: Array of recipient data (RecipientSmtpAddress, RecipientDisplayName, RecipientType, RecipientObjectId)

columns.name: IsOwnedThread
columns.description: Boolean value indicating whether the message is owned by your organization or not (only the messages owned by your organization can be remediated)

columns.name: MessageId
columns.description: Identifier for the message (non-unique)

columns.name: ParentMessageId
columns.description: Identifier for the message that the current message was a reply to, otherwise this is the same as the MessageId

columns.name: GroupId
columns.description: Identifier for the team or group that the message was sent to

columns.name: GroupName
columns.description: Name of the team or group that the message was sent to

columns.name: ThreadId
columns.description: Identifier of the channel or chat thread that the message is part of

columns.name: ThreadSubtype
columns.description: Indicates the channel type, possible values: None, PrivateChannel

columns.name: IsExternalThread
columns.description: Indicates if there are external recipients in the thread (1) or none (0)

columns.name: MessageFormatType
columns.description: Type of message format; possible values: RichText, Text

columns.name: MessageFormatSubtype
columns.description: Subtype of message format, for example, HTML

columns.name: MessageVersion
columns.description: Version number of the message

columns.name: MessageSubject
columns.description: Subject of the message, if it exists

columns.name: ThreatTypes
columns.description: Verdict from the filtering stack on whether the message contains malware, phishing, or other threats

columns.name: DetectionMethods
columns.description: Methods used to detect malware, phishing, or other threats found in the message

columns.name: ConfidenceLevel
columns.description: List of confidence levels for each threat type identified

columns.name: DeliveryAction
columns.description: Delivery action of the message: Delivered, Blocked

columns.name: DeliveryLocation
columns.description: Location of the message at the time of delivery

columns.name: ReportId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the event

columns.name: SafetyTip
columns.description: The safety tip that has been added on a message, if any
